name: TM Auto Wholesalers
description_short: Independent used car dealer in Chesapeake, VA offering pre-owned vehicles and in-house auto financing for all credit types, including bad credit.
description_long:
TM Auto Wholesalers is a small independent used car dealership founded in July 2006 and operated out of 132 Tilden Avenue in Chesapeake, Virginia. The business is a one-man operation run by owner Mike Love, who is also an active community member serving on the Board of Directors for the Chesapeake Rotary Club and chairing the Paint Your Heart Out charitable initiative. The dealership is a verified member of the Virginia Independent Auto Dealers Association (VIADA), the state's trade organization for independent dealers.

The dealership sells pre-owned vehicles across a wide price range — from budget daily drivers to luxury cars — and its standout financial service is 100% credit approval financing, meaning the dealership works with buyers regardless of their credit history, including those with poor, limited, or no credit. Buyers pay a $399 dealer processing fee in addition to standard tax, title, and license costs. The purchasing process is appointment-based, and customers interact exclusively with the owner rather than a traditional sales floor. Vehicle inventory can be browsed online at tmautova.com and drivetmauto.net.

What sets TM Auto apart from larger regional dealers is the single-point-of-contact model: every buyer deals directly with owner Mike Love from first inquiry to final sale. This structure eliminates the high-pressure tactics common at franchise dealerships. The business has earned a 5.0 out of 5.0 star rating on Google Maps from 112 reviewers — an unusually strong score for any automotive business — suggesting consistent customer satisfaction over many years of operation.

The dealership is best suited for Hampton Roads–area buyers seeking affordable used vehicles, particularly those with challenged credit histories who have been turned away elsewhere. The main limitations are practical: this is a single-operator shop with a finite inventory, no formal written warranty on most vehicles (some sold as-is), no mobile app, and geographic reach limited to the Chesapeake/Virginia Beach metro. The BBB profile exists but accreditation status is unconfirmed, and no formal money-back guarantee policy is published.

pricing.guarantee_details: No formal money-back guarantee. Some vehicles sold as-is with no warranty. Contact provider for details.

certifications: VIADA Member (Virginia Independent Auto Dealers Association)

pros: Perfect 5.0/5.0 Google rating from 112 verified customer reviews — exceptionally high for an auto dealer
100% credit approval claim — works with buyers who have poor, no, or challenged credit histories
Owner-operated since July 2006 — nearly 20 years of continuous operation under the same management
Appointment-based, one-on-one buying process — no sales floor pressure tactics
Verified VIADA member, meeting Virginia's independent dealer professional standards
Inventory spans budget to luxury price points, broadening options for different budgets
Owner is a named community leader in Chesapeake (Rotary Club Board, Paint Your Heart Out Chair)
cons: Single-person operation means limited inventory depth and potential scheduling bottlenecks
Many vehicles sold as-is with no warranty — buyers have limited recourse after purchase
No formal written money-back or satisfaction guarantee policy found on website
Service area is strictly local — Hampton Roads / Chesapeake, VA only; no remote or nationwide service
BBB accreditation unconfirmed and numerical BBB rating not publicly surfaced
best_for: Hampton Roads and Chesapeake, VA area buyers seeking affordable used vehicles
Buyers with poor, limited, or damaged credit who need financing and have been declined elsewhere
Shoppers who want direct, one-on-one access to the dealership owner without a sales team intermediary
Buyers comfortable with an as-is purchase on budget vehicles and willing to do their own due diligence
diagnosis: TM Auto Wholesalers is genuinely well-suited for Chesapeake-area buyers with credit challenges who want a low-pressure, owner-direct car-buying experience — the near-perfect Google rating over 112 reviews is a credible signal of consistent service quality. The main caveat is that this is a micro-operation: inventory is limited, many cars are sold as-is without warranty, and there is no formal buyer protection policy, so buyers should conduct independent vehicle inspections before purchasing.
services: Used car sales (budget to luxury price range)
In-house auto financing for all credit types
100% credit approval financing for bad/no credit buyers
Appointment-based vehicle viewing and test drives
Online inventory browsing at tmautova.com and drivetmauto.net
Direct owner consultation on vehicle selection
